visaTimeline.subheading: Complete each step to submit your visa application

application.title: Complete your application
application.subtitle: Fill in personal info, passport and travel details

documents.title: Upload your documents

submit.title: Submit application

decision.title: Decision
decision.subtitle: Visa approved and e-visa document sent to you

nextAction.title: Next action
nextAction.getStartedSub: Pick up where you left off when you're ready.

journey.subheading: Here's how the rest of your application unfolds. Estimated time:

ukvi_account.title: Create UKVI account
ukvi_account.subtitle: Sign up for a UK Visas & Immigration account to start your application.

form.title: Online application
form.subtitle: Fill out the 44-page Standard Visitor application.

pay.title: Pay visa fee
pay.subtitle: Pay the UK visa application fee online.

documents.title: Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: Upload bank statements, travel plans, and proof of accommodation.

ukvcas.title: UKVCAS biometrics
ukvcas.subtitle: Book and attend a biometrics appointment at a UKVCAS centre.

decision.title: Decision
decision.subtitle: UKVI reviews your application and returns a decision.

form.title: Schengen application
form.subtitle: Complete the harmonized Schengen short-stay application.

documents.title: Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: Travel insurance, accommodation, financials, and itinerary.

vfs_appointment.title: VFS appointment
vfs_appointment.subtitle: Book an appointment at the relevant VFS Global centre.

biometrics.title: Biometrics
biometrics.subtitle: Provide fingerprints and a photo at your appointment.

decision.title: Decision
decision.subtitle: The consulate decides on your short-stay visa.

passport_pickup.title: Passport pickup
passport_pickup.subtitle: Collect your passport from the VFS centre once ready.

stream_select.title: Pick visitor stream
stream_select.subtitle: Choose between Tourist, Business, Sponsored Family, ADS, or Frequent Traveller.

signing.title: Sign your declaration
signing.subtitle: Review your character and health declarations and sign them before submission.

pay.title: Pay visa fee
pay.subtitle: Pay the visa application charge in ImmiAccount.

biometrics_optional.title: Biometrics (if required)
biometrics_optional.subtitle: Some nationalities must provide biometrics at a VAC.

decision.title: Decision
decision.subtitle: Home Affairs assesses and issues a decision.

form.title: E-Visa form
form.subtitle: Fill out the Vietnam e-Visa application online.

wait_email.title: Wait for email
wait_email.subtitle: Vietnam Immigration emails the e-Visa PDF when approved.

print_and_travel.title: Print and travel
print_and_travel.subtitle: Print the e-Visa PDF and present it on arrival.

form.title: DS-160 form
form.subtitle: Complete the online DS-160 nonimmigrant visa application.

pay.title: Pay MRV fee
pay.subtitle: Pay the visa application fee at a designated bank or online.

schedule_interview.title: Schedule interview
schedule_interview.subtitle: Book your visa interview at the U.S. embassy or consulate.

documents.title: Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: Gather passport, photo, financials, and travel evidence.

interview.title: Consular interview
interview.subtitle: Attend your interview at the U.S. consulate or embassy.

passport_pickup.title: Passport return
passport_pickup.subtitle: Your passport is mailed or returned for pickup with the visa.

decision.title: Decision
decision.subtitle: The consular officer issues a decision after the interview.

form.subtitle: Complete the Indonesia tourist visa B211A form.

submit.title: Submit application

email_visa.title: E-Visa email
email_visa.subtitle: Receive your B211A approval by email.

signing.notAuApplication: Signing is only required for Australian Subclass 600 visa applications.
signing.alreadySignedBody: Your signature is on file. The submission service is taking it from here.
signing.submittedBody: We've queued your application for the final submit step.
signing.pageSubtitle: Review the answers below and sign at the bottom. Your signature is rendered onto the official Subclass 600 declaration before submission.
signing.signSubtitle: Use your finger, stylus, or mouse. Tap Clear to retry.

services.title: Services
services.noScheduledDescription: You don't have any upcoming services. Browse our recommended tests below to get started.
services.noHistoryDescription: You haven't completed any services yet. Your history will appear here.

personalized.heading: Personalized recommendations
personalized.subheading: Tests based on your profile and health data

supplement.title: Supplement Marketplace

service.title: Service Marketplace
service.description: Access to curated RX's like documents or peptides

bloodPanel.title: Blood Panel

advancedBloodPanel.title: Advanced Blood Panel

glp1.title: GLP-1 Treatment

allergyTesting.title: Food & Environmental Allergy Testing
allergyTesting.description: Determine your specific food and environmental allergies.

cancerTest.title: Grail Galleri Multi Cancer Test
cancerTest.description: Get ahead of your cancer risk with this comprehensive test. Detects over 100 types of cancer.

dexaScan.title: DEXA Bone Density Scan
dexaScan.description: Measure your bone density and risk of osteoporosis.

gutMicrobiome.title: Gut Microbiome Testing
gutMicrobiome.description: Analyze your gut microbiome to understand your digestive health.

toxicology.title: Environmental Toxicology Testing
toxicology.description: Analyze your environmental toxins and exposure.

personalInfo.name: Personal Info
personalInfo.description: Full name, date of birth, nationality

statusHub.title: Application Status Center
statusHub.subtitle: Track each visa application across the full cycle: form filling, documents, submission queue, and official outcome. Home stays focused on lightweight form progress.
statusHub.noFilteredResults: No applications match this filter yet.
statusHub.emptyBody: Choose a destination on Home and VIZA will attach the matching country and visa workflow.
statusHub.emptyStartedBody: Choose a destination from Home and fill part of the form. Started applications will appear here with full status.
statusHub.detailMissingBody: This application may not have been started yet, or it may not belong to the current account. You can still start the matching country and visa flow.

destination.title: Choose destination and visa type
destination.description: The application is tied to a specific country and visa route.

form.title: Complete the application form
form.description: Answer the official form questions and save reusable applicant details.

photo.title: Upload photo
photo.description: Prepare a passport-style photo or identity image for this destination.

documents.title: Upload supporting documents
documents.description: Add passport, travel, finance, accommodation, or visa-specific supporting files.

submission.title: Submit and process
submission.description: The application enters the submission queue or the official/manual processing flow.

result.title: Official outcome
result.description: Wait for the official decision; VIZA does not invent approval or refusal states.

application.documentsStepDescription: Upload required and optional supporting documents

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Add travel companions if this application is part of a group. Each companion gets their own application form prefilled with shared trip details and their frequent traveler profile.
team.listSubtitle: Review, edit, or remove companions before the final submission step.
team.loadError: We could not load companions right now.
team.createError: We could not create this companion application.
team.noApplication: Create or open the main application before adding companions.
team.deleteError: We could not remove this companion.
team.addedSuccess: Companion review finished and added to this team.
team.emptyDescription: Continue without adding anyone, or add a frequent/custom traveler.
team.hint: Submit only after your own review and every companion review are finished.

dialog.title: Add companion
dialog.subtitle: Choose a frequent traveler or enter a new traveler. Custom travelers are saved for future trips.

deleteDialog.title: Remove companion?
deleteDialog.description: This removes the companion application from this team. The frequent traveler profile stays available.

clientStatus.title: Status Center
clientStatus.subtitle: Track payment, consent, form answers, documents, packet preparation, external handoff, and official result delivery in one place.
clientStatus.partialData: Some automation details are temporarily unavailable. Visible statuses are still limited to customer-safe information.
clientStatus.timelineSubtitle: Each step reflects VIZA website state and externally ingested submission or result updates.
clientStatus.filesSubtitle: Links appear only when VIZA has a receipt, packet, approval, issued visa, rejection, or result reference.
clientStatus.filesEmpty: Receipts and result files will appear here after they are created or received.
clientStatus.activityEmpty: No customer-visible automation updates have been recorded yet.

liveAction.title: Official site action required
liveAction.description: VIZA has opened and prepared the official portal. Complete the visible official-site step yourself, then continue the assisted submission here.
liveAction.completed: Action completed. VIZA will resume the job.
liveAction.failed: We could not resume the job. Please try again or contact support.

empty.title: No active applications yet
empty.description: Choose a destination from Home to start a visa workflow. Once an application exists, this page will show payment, consent, documents, packet, handoff, and result status.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Agency-fee payment is confirmed before VIZA prepares the application workflow.

consent.title: Consent and authorisation
consent.description: Your consent and agency authorisation are captured before VIZA handles documents or packets.

form.title: Form answers
form.description: Saved application answers and official-format fields are tracked here.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Passport, photo, travel, finance, and visa-specific supporting files are checked for upload state.

packet.title: Packet generation
packet.description: VIZA prepares a customer-safe application packet after core requirements are ready.

handoff.title: External handoff
handoff.description: Externally ingested submission status and official references appear when available.

result.title: Result delivery
result.description: Approval, issued visa, rejection, or result files appear only when official outcome data exists.

documentUpload.title: Document Upload
documentUpload.description: Upload all required documents for your Indonesia B211A tourist visa application.

review.title: Review Your Application
review.reviewMessage: Please review your details carefully before submitting.

validation.hasErrors: Application has errors — please fix before submitting

photoUpload.title: Upload Photo
photoUpload.instructions: Please refer to the Department of State's image requirements. Your photo must be in JPEG format (.jpg), 240KB or less, and taken within the last 6 months.
photoUpload.cropToolDescription: Use this tool to resize and crop your photo to meet the Department of State's head-size and digital image submission requirements.
photoUpload.formatHint: Choose a JPEG format image (.jpg file type) that is 240KB or less in file size.
photoUpload.qualityDescription: To ensure the highest quality photos will be used in the final printed travel document: color photo, plain white or off-white background, full-face view directly facing the camera, neutral facial expression, both eyes open, taken within the last 6 months.
photoUpload.passed: Photo passed quality standards. Your photo has successfully been uploaded and passed all quality checks.
photoUpload.failed: The submitted photo did not meet the image quality requirements.
photoUpload.confirmNotice: Please note that you may be required to bring a passport-like photo to your interview.
photoUpload.uploadError: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.

failures.wrong_format: File must be in JPEG format (.jpg)
failures.dimensions_too_small: Image must be at least 600x600 pixels
failures.not_square: Image must have a square (1:1) aspect ratio

translation.translationFailed: Translation could not be completed automatically.
translation.bilingualHint: Review your original answers next to the official English or formatted version before submitting. Translation issues do not block submission, but names and dates should match your passport and official form format.
translation.passportSpellingWarning: Check that this romanized spelling matches your passport exactly.
translation.dateFormatWarning: Confirm this date is in official format: {format}.
translation.noReviewRows: No completed answers are available to review yet.

status.title: Application Submitted
status.message: Your application has been submitted to the Indonesian e-visa portal. You will receive an email confirmation once your visa is approved. Keep your confirmation number for reference.
status.travelPlannerHint: Now that your visa form is complete, you can start the travel chatbot to build your itinerary, compare flights/hotels, and export Word/PDF.

identity.scanAutoReadSubtitle: We'll read your details automatically — no typing required. Use the bio page (the one with your photo).
identity.scanInstructions: Lay the data page flat under good light. We need to read the photo, MRZ, and all printed text.
identity.scanBrowseHint: JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF — up to 10 MB
identity.scanDropSubtitle: Or click to browse — your file is encrypted and never shared
identity.scanExtractError: We couldn't read this photo. Try a clearer shot or type it manually.
identity.scanTipCornersBody: Frame the entire bio page including the bottom MRZ.
identity.scanTipLightBody: Avoid shadows from your hand or phone case.
identity.scanTipGlareBody: Tilt slightly if your seal is reflecting.
identity.scanResultSubtitle: Edit anything that looks wrong before continuing.
identity.scanUploadedSuccess: Passport bio page uploaded successfully and saved to your document record.
identity.scanPrivacyNote: Your scan is encrypted in transit, used only for extraction, and removed after submission.
identity.scanNoDraft: Couldn't start a draft application. Reload the page and try again.
identity.scanWrongFormat: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image.
identity.scanTooLarge: Image is too large — please use one under 8 MB.
identity.scanNotAuthenticated: Please sign in again to scan your passport.

scanConfidence.low: Low confidence — please review every field

identity.title: Your details
identity.subtitle: Enter these exactly as they appear on your passport.
identity.noStateProvince: My country of birth has no states/provinces
identity.hasOtherName: Have you gone by a different name?
identity.hasOtherNameTooltip: This includes maiden names, religious names, professional names or any other name previously used on official documents. For example: Former name: Wang Xiaohong → Li Xiaohong (after marriage)
identity.hasNativeAlphabet: Does your name use non-English characters?
identity.hasNativeAlphabetTooltip: If your passport shows your name in Chinese characters, select 'Yes' and enter it as shown. For example: 张伟 or 李明
identity.hasTelecode: Do you have a telecode for your name?
identity.hasTelecodeTooltip: A telecode is a 4-digit number representing a Chinese character. If you know your telecode, select 'Yes' and enter the number. For example: 张 = 1728, 伟 = 0251, 李 = 2621, 明 = 2494

contact.title: How can the embassy reach you?
contact.subtitle: Primary contact, home address, and any social profiles required by the official form.
contact.secondaryPhoneHint: A second number the embassy can reach you at
contact.mailingSame: Is your mailing address the same?
contact.socialMediaHint: Select the platforms the official form asks about. We will only include social media details where they are required.

passport.title: Passport & identification
passport.subtitle: Match what's printed on your passport exactly.
passport.numberHint: On the passport information page. Usually 8-9 characters.
passport.bookNumberQuestion: Does your passport have a separate book number?
passport.bookNumberHint: Only if your passport has a separate book number
passport.bookNumberHelp: Some passports include an extra number on the inside cover page. Most do not. If unsure, choose "No".
passport.issuedInAnotherCountry: Was it issued in another country?
passport.extraOtherCitizenship: Do you hold citizenship of another country?
passport.extraOtherCountryPermanentResidence: Are you a permanent resident of another country?
passport.extraUsSocialSecurityOrTaxId: Have you ever had a U.S. social security number or taxpayer ID?
passport.extraNationalityHasPassport: Do you hold that country's passport?
passport.extraSsnHint: Only fill this if you had one before (for example, if you previously worked in the U.S.).
passport.extraItinHint: IRS-issued tax number. Only fill this if you previously filed U.S. taxes.
passport.nationalIdHelp: Your 18-digit Chinese Resident Identity Card number.
passport.lostPassportQuestion: Have you ever lost a passport or had one stolen?
passport.lostPassportKnowNumber: Do you know the passport number?
passport.additionalNationality: Are you a citizen of any other country?
passport.nationalId: Do you have a national ID from your country?
passport.nationalIdHint: e.g. China Resident ID, Indian Aadhaar
passport.lostPassport: Have you ever lost a passport or had one stolen?

travel.title: Your trip & U.S. visa history
travel.subtitle: Rough dates are fine. Most answers here are simple yes/no.
travel.usAddressTitle: Address where you'll stay in the U.S.
travel.usStayPageTitle: Where will you stay in the U.S.?
travel.usStayPageSubtitle: Please provide your accommodation details while in the U.S.
travel.accomContactSubtitle: Who or where will you be staying with
travel.hotelHint: You can find the hotel address and phone number in your booking confirmation email or on the hotel's website.
travel.airbnbHint: Please use the host's name and property address from your Airbnb booking.
travel.accomAddressSubtitle: The full address of your U.S. accommodation
travel.contactInfoHotelSubtitle: The hotel's phone and email — not yours
travel.contactInfoFriendsSubtitle: Your friend or relative's phone and email — not yours
travel.contactInfoDefaultSubtitle: Their phone and email — not yours
travel.plans: Do you have specific travel plans?
travel.placesToVisit: Places you plan to visit in the U.S.
travel.payer: Who is paying for this trip?
travel.embassyLocationHint: Usually the U.S. embassy closest to where you live
travel.payerAddressSameAsYou: Is their address the same as yours?
travel.noPostalCode: This country has no postal code
travel.previousVisa: Have you ever been issued a U.S. visa?
travel.previousRefusal: Have you ever been refused a U.S. visa or admission?
travel.estaDenied: Have you ever been denied ESTA?
travel.petitionFiled: Has anyone filed an immigration petition for you?
travel.hasCompanions: Are there other people traveling with you?
travel.companionGroupTravel: Are you traveling as part of a group or organization?
travel.hasVisitedOtherCountriesLast5Years: In the last five years, have you visited any other countries?
travel.unknownLicenseNumber: I don't know the license number
travel.unknownVisaNumber: I don't know the visa number
travel.sameVisaType: Are you applying for the same visa class?
travel.sameCountryApply: Are you applying in the same country where it was issued?
travel.tenPrinted: Have your ten fingerprints been taken?
travel.visaLostStolen: Has your visa ever been lost or stolen?
travel.visaCancelledRevoked: Has your visa ever been cancelled or revoked?
travel.received221g: Have you ever received a 221(g) notice?
travel.hasBeenInUs: Have you ever been to the U.S. before?
travel.hasBeenInUsHint: Even a short tourist trip counts
travel.hasUsDriversLicense: Do you hold a U.S. driver's license?

work.title: Work & education
work.subtitle: What you do day-to-day — used for the DS-160 employment / study section.
work.jobDutiesPlaceholder: e.g. Backend development for ad platform
work.hasPreviousEmployer: Have you had a previous employer?
work.hasAttendedEducation: Have you attended any school past secondary?

usContact.title: Your U.S. contact
usContact.subtitle: A person or organization in the U.S. that knows you. Required for every DS-160.

family.title: Family & background
family.subtitle: A few questions about your family — standard for all visa applications.
family.parentSubtitle: As shown on ID or as best you know
family.fatherUnknown: I don't know my father's information
family.fatherMarkedUnknown: Father's information is marked as unknown
family.motherUnknown: I don't know my mother's information
family.motherMarkedUnknown: Mother's information is marked as unknown
family.formerSpouseSubtitle: Provide info for each former spouse (max 5)
family.noPostalCode: This country has no postal code
family.relativesInUs: Do you have immediate relatives in the U.S.?
family.relativesInUsHint: Spouse, fiancé(e), children, siblings, or parents
family.hasOtherRelatives: Do you have any other relatives in the U.S.?
family.hasOtherRelativesHint: Cousins, aunts/uncles, in-laws — most select No
family.clanTribe: Do you belong to a clan or tribe?
family.languagesHint: Pick all that apply — add more if needed

background.title: Background & embassy account
background.subtitle: Most applicants select "none apply". The three security questions at the bottom are required by every DS-160.
background.grounds: Do any of these apply to you?
background.noneApplyHint: Health, criminal, security, immigration — all set to No
background.someApplyHint: You'll be prompted in the full form
background.addMoreInFullForm: We'll set the obvious questions to No for now. You can edit any of them in the full form review.
background.needAnswerHint: Choose categories and answer the detailed questions
background.categoryPrompt: Which categories apply to you? Select all that apply:
background.categoryHealthSubtitle: Communicable disease, physical or mental disorder, drug abuse
background.categoryCriminalSubtitle: Arrests, convictions, controlled substance and related violations
background.categorySecuritySubtitle: Espionage, sabotage, terrorism, and related activity
background.categoryPoliticalSubtitle: Party membership, Nazi involvement, or persecution
background.categoryImmigrationSubtitle: Visa fraud, removal, unlawful presence, and custody issues
background.categoryOtherSubtitle: Public charge, withheld custody, and other grounds

questions.has_communicable_disease: Do you have a communicable disease of public health significance?
questions.has_physical_mental_disorder: Do you have a mental or physical disorder that may pose a threat to the safety or welfare of yourself or others?
questions.has_drug_abuse: Have you ever been a drug abuser or addict?
questions.has_been_arrested: Have you ever been arrested or convicted for any offense or crime, even though subject of a pardon, amnesty, or other similar action?
questions.has_violated_substance_law: Have you ever violated, or engaged in a conspiracy to violate, any law relating to controlled substances?
questions.has_prostitution_involvement: Are you coming to the United States to engage in prostitution or unlawful commercialized vice, or have you been engaged in prostitution or procuring prostitutes within the past 10 years?
questions.has_money_laundering: Have you ever been involved in, or do you seek to engage in, money laundering?
questions.has_human_trafficking: Have you ever committed or conspired to commit a human trafficking offense in the United States or outside the United States?
questions.has_supported_trafficking: Have you ever knowingly aided, abetted, assisted, or colluded with an individual who has committed or conspired to commit a severe human trafficking offense?
questions.is_trafficking_relative: Are you the child, spouse, son, or daughter of an individual who has committed or conspired to commit a human trafficking offense, and have you knowingly benefited from the trafficking activities in the last five years?
questions.has_been_detained: Have you ever been detained, retained, or confined by any country?
questions.intends_espionage: Do you seek to engage in espionage, sabotage, export control violations, or any other illegal activity while in the United States?
questions.intends_terrorism: Do you seek to engage in terrorist activities while in the United States, or have you ever engaged in terrorist activities?
questions.will_support_terrorists: Have you ever or do you intend to provide financial assistance or other support to terrorists or terrorist organizations?
questions.is_terrorist_organization_member: Are you a member or representative of a terrorist organization?
questions.is_terrorist_relative: Are you the spouse, son, or daughter of an individual who has engaged in terrorist activity that caused harm to another person?
questions.has_committed_genocide: Have you ever ordered, incited, committed, assisted, or otherwise participated in genocide?
questions.has_committed_torture: Have you ever committed, ordered, incited, assisted, or otherwise participated in torture?
questions.has_committed_extrajudicial_killings: Have you committed, ordered, incited, assisted, or otherwise participated in extrajudicial killings, political killings, or other acts of violence?
questions.has_used_child_soldiers: Have you ever engaged in the recruitment or the use of child soldiers?
questions.violated_religious_freedom: Have you, while serving as a government official, been responsible for or directly carried out particularly severe violations of religious freedom?
questions.involved_population_control: Have you ever ordered, incited, committed, assisted, or otherwise participated in forced sterilization?
questions.involved_organ_trafficking: Have you ever been directly involved in the coercive transplantation of human organs or bodily tissue?
questions.obtained_visa_by_fraud: Have you ever sought to obtain or assist others to obtain a visa, entry into the United States, or any other United States immigration benefit by fraud or willful misrepresentation?
questions.has_been_removed: Have you ever been removed or deported from any country?
questions.subject_to_removal_order: Have you ever been subject to a removal or deportation order from the United States?
questions.failed_removal_hearing: Have you ever failed to attend a removal or deportation hearing in the United States?
questions.has_overstayed: Have you ever been unlawfully present in the United States or violated the terms of entry?
questions.withheld_child_custody: Have you ever withheld custody of a U.S. citizen child outside the United States from a person granted legal custody by a U.S. court?
questions.voted_illegally: Have you voted in the United States in violation of any law or regulation?
questions.renounced_citizenship: Have you ever renounced United States citizenship for the purposes of avoiding taxation?

background.embassySubtitle: Used to create your embassy account. Pick answers you'll remember.
background.birthCity: What city were you born in?
background.favoriteFood: What is your least favorite food?

workEducation.subtitle: Tell us about your current work, studies, and recent history.

workEducation.educationHistorySubtitle: We only need your highest or most recent schooling. Keep it simple.
workEducation.noEducationHint: No education history to report? Select No and continue.
workEducation.organizationSubtitle: Professional, social, or charitable organizations. Names are enough.

workEducation.specializedSkillsSubtitle: For example firearms, explosives, nuclear, biological, or chemical experience.

share.title: Share your referral code
share.description: Invite your friends to join VIZA with your personal code.

earn.title: Earn 99 points
earn.description: You also receive 99 points for each new user who signs up with your code.

redeem.description: Use points in the points marketplace inside Settings.

supportCta.description: Choose an issue type and share the details. We'll answer first, then help you submit a support request if needed.

whenReward.question: When do I get my reward?
whenReward.answer: Your 99 points are added after a new user successfully registers with your referral code.

howUseCredit.question: How do I use points?
howUseCredit.answer: Open the points center in Settings and redeem available rewards from the points marketplace.

whoEligible.question: Who's eligible?
whoEligible.answer: New members only. One discount per new member.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage payment preferences, reusable visa profile details, account security, and support links from one place.

profile.completionHint: Complete this once so VIZA can prefill repeated visa questions.

pointsCenter.title: VIZA points
pointsCenter.referralRule: When a new user signs up with your referral code, both accounts receive 99 points.
pointsCenter.purchaseRule: Earn 100 VIZA points for every RMB 100 you spend. Points are added to your current balance after payment is confirmed.
pointsCenter.marketplaceDescription: Redeem points for useful VIZA rewards. Rewards unlock automatically when your balance is high enough.

arrivalCardSubmission.title: Free arrival card submission
arrivalCardSubmission.description: Redeem 1,000 points for one free arrival card submission for eligible destinations.

payment.managerHint: Bind multiple accounts for this payment method and choose the default account to try first.

managerHints.bank_card: Cards complete hosted secure verification. VIZA does not receive the full card number or CVV.
managerHints.wechat_pay: WeChat Pay uses QR scan binding, so you no longer enter a WeChat ID or phone number manually.
managerHints.alipay: Alipay uses QR scan binding, so you no longer enter an Alipay ID or phone number manually.

payment.empty: No account is bound yet. Add one to edit, delete, or set it as default here.
payment.safeHint: Only save a nickname and identifying note here. Do not enter a full card number, security code, or password.
payment.stripeHint: Card details are entered only on the hosted secure page. VIZA does not store the full card number or CVV.
payment.cardHint: Card details are entered only in the Airwallex hosted secure element. VIZA does not receive or store the full card number, expiry, or CVV.
payment.cardElementPreparing: Loading the Airwallex secure card element.
payment.qrEmpty: Generate a QR code, then scan it with the matching app to bind the account.

qrHint.wechat_pay: Scan with WeChat to authorize account binding, then return here and check the status.
qrHint.alipay: Scan with Alipay to authorize account binding, then return here and check the status.

wechat_pay.label: For example: My WeChat
wechat_pay.identifier: For example: WeChat nickname or phone suffix

agent.handoffHint: If the answer doesn't solve it, submit a support request and we'll follow up quickly.

requestForm.title: Submit a support request
requestForm.subtitle: Describe the issue like an email and attach files if needed. We'll respond quickly.
requestForm.subjectPlaceholder: Example: Payment failed / Question about status
requestForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened, when it occurred, and what outcome you expect.
requestForm.attachmentsHint: Add screenshots or files to help us investigate faster.
requestForm.helper: You can track the status from My requests.
requestForm.successBody: We received your issue and will update the status shortly.
requestForm.subjectError: Please enter a subject (at least 3 characters).
requestForm.descriptionError: Please provide a fuller description (at least 10 characters).
requestForm.submitError: We could not submit the request right now. Try again soon.

quickIssues.refund: I have a payment or refund question

help.heroSubtitle: Find answers, guides, and support for your account.

accountProfile.title: Account & Profile
accountProfile.description: Update your profile details, password, and preferences.

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.description: Invite friends and track your rewards.

resetPassword.question: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.answer: Go to Settings and open the Security section to reset your password. Enter your current password and then your new password twice to confirm. Changes take effect immediately.

seeCredits.question: Where can I see my credits?
seeCredits.answer: Credits appear in the Billing section of your Settings page and are also displayed at checkout before you confirm a purchase.

referrals.question: How do referrals work?
referrals.answer: Share your unique referral link from the Refer Your Friends page. When a friend signs up and completes their first purchase, you both receive ₱9,999 in credits to use on VIZA services.

bookBloodTest.question: How do I book a blood test?
bookBloodTest.answer: Navigate to the Services tab and select the blood panel that matches your goals. Follow the booking flow to choose a date and time. You can view and manage upcoming bookings in the Scheduled tab.

labResults.question: When will I receive my results?
labResults.answer: Results are typically available within 3–5 business days after your blood draw. You'll receive a notification when your report is ready, and you can view it in the Data tab.

updateInfo.question: How do I update my personal information?
updateInfo.answer: Go to Settings and select the Profile tab. You can update your name, date of birth, phone number, and address. Tap Save to apply changes.

updatePayment.question: How do I add or update a payment method?
updatePayment.answer: Billing and payment method management are currently handled offline. Please contact our support team to update your billing details.

cancelReschedule.question: Can I cancel or reschedule a booked service?
cancelReschedule.answer: Yes. Open the Services tab and go to Scheduled bookings. Select the booking you want to manage and follow the prompts to reschedule or cancel.

dataPrivate.question: Is my health data private?
dataPrivate.answer: Yes. Your health data is stored securely and is only accessible to you and your assigned visa team. We never sell personal health information to third parties.

contactSupport.question: How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer: You can reach our support team through the Concierge tab in the app for real-time assistance, or by emailing us directly at support@viza.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules and guidelines that govern your use of our platform.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using the VIZA platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
acceptance.p2: These terms apply to all users of the platform, including users, registered members, and any visitors who access our services.

services.title: Our services
services.intro: VIZA provides a visa services platform that connects users with licensed visa professionals for consultations, lab bookings, health assessments, and related wellness services.
services.item1: Online visa consultations with licensed consultants.
services.item2: Blood panel bookings and lab result delivery.
services.item3: Supplement and product purchases through the Services marketplace.
services.item4: Personalized action plans and health recommendations.
services.item5: Concierge support for your health journey.
services.disclaimer: Our platform is not a substitute for emergency visa care. If you are experiencing a visa emergency, please contact your local emergency services immediately.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.intro: To use our services, you must:
eligibility.item1: Be at least 18 years of age, or have parental or guardian consent.
eligibility.item2: Provide accurate, current, and complete information when registering.
eligibility.item3: Maintain the security of your account credentials.
eligibility.item4: Reside in a location where our services are available.

responsibilities.title: User responsibilities
responsibilities.intro: When using our platform, you agree to:
responsibilities.item1: Provide truthful and complete health information during consultations and questionnaires.
responsibilities.item2: Follow visa advice provided by our licensed professionals responsibly.
responsibilities.item3: Not share your account credentials with any other person.
responsibilities.item4: Not use the platform for any unlawful or unauthorized purpose.
responsibilities.item5: Notify us promptly if you suspect any unauthorized access to your account.

visa.title: Visa disclaimer
visa.p1: The visa services on our platform are provided by independently licensed physicians and visa services professionals. VIZA facilitates access to these professionals but does not itself practice medicine.
visa.p2: Health information provided through our platform is for informational purposes and does not replace professional visa advice, diagnosis, or service. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have.

payments.title: Payments and credits
payments.p1: By making a purchase on our platform, you authorize us to charge your selected payment method for the applicable fees. All prices are shown in Philippine Pesos (PHP).
payments.p2: Credits earned through referrals or promotions have no cash value and cannot be transferred.
payments.p3: Refunds are subject to our Refund Policy and applicable Philippine consumer protection laws.
payments.p4: Subscription fees (if any) are billed in advance and are non-refundable except as required by law.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.p1: All content, features, and functionality on the VIZA platform—including text, graphics, logos, and software—are the exclusive property of VIZA and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written permission.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.p1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, VIZA shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, our services. Our total liability to you for any claim arising under these terms shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve months prior to the claim.

termination.title: Termination
termination.p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the platform at our discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.
termination.p2: You may close your account at any time by contacting our support team. Termination does not affect any rights or obligations that arose prior to the termination date.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated terms on this page. Continued use of our platform after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

law.title: Governing law
law.p1: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of the Philippines. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Philippines.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through the Concierge section of your VIZA account or email us at legal@viza.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: VIZA ('we', 'our', or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform and related services.
introduction.p2: By accessing or using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. Please read it carefully before using our platform.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us and information generated through your use of our services.
collect.item1: Personal identifiers such as your name, email address, phone number, and date of birth.
collect.item2: Health and visa information including results, profile data, visa history, allergies, and current documents.
collect.item3: Payment information processed securely through our payment providers.
collect.item4: Communications between you and our visa team, including consultation notes and messages.
collect.item5: Device and usage data such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

use.title: How we use your information
use.intro: We use the information we collect to deliver and improve our services, including:
use.item1: Providing visa services consultations, lab bookings, and service services.
use.item2: Communicating with you about your health, appointments, and orders.
use.item3: Processing payments and fulfilling orders through our platform.
use.item4: Improving the accuracy and quality of our health assessments.
use.item5: Complying with applicable laws, regulations, and visa standards.
use.noSell: We never sell your personal or health information to third parties for marketing purposes.

sharing.title: Sharing your information
sharing.intro: We may share your information only in the following limited circumstances:
sharing.item1: With licensed visa professionals involved in your care.
sharing.item2: With trusted service providers (e.g., labs, pharmacies) necessary to fulfill your orders.
sharing.item3: With payment processors to complete transactions securely.
sharing.item4: When required by law, court order, or applicable regulation.
sharing.item5: With your explicit consent for any other purpose.

security.title: Data security
security.p1: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These include encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access controls, and regular security reviews.
security.p2: While we take all reasonable precautions, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We encourage you to protect your account credentials and notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
rights.access: Access: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
rights.correction: Correction: Request that inaccurate or incomplete information be corrected.
rights.deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information, subject to legal and visa record retention obligations.
rights.portability: Portability: Request your data in a machine-readable format where applicable.
rights.withdrawal: Withdrawal of consent: Withdraw consent for non-essential data processing at any time.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.p1: We retain your personal and health information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with applicable laws. Visa records may be retained for a minimum period as required by Philippine visa regulations.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.p1: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact our team through the Concierge section of your VIZA account or email us at privacy@viza.com.

subscriptionManagement.title: Manage subscription
subscriptionManagement.subtitle: Review your monthly plan, renewal date, and payment method. Cancel at period end or resume renewal when needed.
subscriptionManagement.actionsDescription: Cancellation keeps the current period active, then stops renewal at period end.
subscriptionManagement.confirmCancel: Cancel auto-renewal? You can keep using the current period until it ends.
subscriptionManagement.cancelFailed: Could not cancel the subscription. Please try again later.
subscriptionManagement.resumeFailed: Could not resume the subscription. Please try again later.
subscriptionManagement.cancelled: Cancellation at period end is now set.

subscription.title: Choose how you want to use VIZA applications
subscription.subtitle: Use monthly access for frequent planning, or pay per destination for an occasional trip. All prices are shown in Chinese yuan. Choose online payment first, then pick card, WeChat Pay, or Alipay at checkout.

allCountries.title: All-country access
allCountries.body: Monthly plans unlock application entry points for every supported country.

threeWays.title: Three payment entries
threeWays.body: Use card, WeChat Pay QR, or Alipay online payment.

officialFees.title: Clear service pricing
officialFees.body: Prices shown here are VIZA service fees and exclude official or third-party costs.

monthly.title: Monthly plans
monthly.subtitle: Monthly access is built for travelers preparing multiple destinations. Both plans cover every country, with different monthly limits and advanced tools.

access.name: Access
access.description: For frequent solo travelers who need core application tools and progress tracking.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For families, groups, and multi-destination trips that need AI, group applications, and Travel Agent support.

features.countryAccess: Application entry points for every country

payPer.title: Pay per application
payPer.subtitle: Pay one destination at a time when you only need VIZA for an occasional trip.
payPer.limitBody: Each purchase covers 1 country. Users should complete form filling and submission preparation within 1 month.
payPer.groupBody: Pay-per-application includes requirements checks, dynamic checklists, multi-language assistance, AI assistance, group applications, and Travel Agent support.
payPer.paymentNote: Pay-per-application destinations now follow the same region and form-entry grouping as the Home destination browser.
payPer.noResults: No matching country or form found.
payPer.chooseRegion: Select a region card to open its dedicated page, or search a country directly.
payPer.feeNote: All prices are VIZA service fees per application and exclude official visa fees, visa center fees, biometrics, courier fees, or expedited processing.

page.title: B1/B2 appointment setup
page.subtitle: Continue after DS-160 with a compliant China appointment assistant. VIZA can help prepare and observe progress, but pauses for login, CAPTCHA, payment, policy notices, slot choice, and final confirmation.

usAppointment.dryRunNotice: This China-first workflow does not bypass CAPTCHA, MFA, waiting rooms, rate limits, payment, policy notices, or final confirmation. VIZA uses user-triggered checks and pauses before irreversible official-site actions.

errors.generic: The appointment request could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.withCode: The appointment request could not be completed. Reference: {code}.

completed.title: DS-160 completed
completed.pendingCode: Use the stored DS-160 code or enter it below

setup.title: Appointment setup
setup.ds160CodeHint: Leave blank if VIZA already stored the DS-160 application ID from the previous step.
setup.aliasNotice: For new appointment accounts, VIZA uses the applicant alias email assigned to this profile. Verification messages are received through Cloudflare Email Routing and consumed from Supabase inbound mail; VIZA does not use legacy IMAP for this flow.
setup.consentRequiredError: Please review and accept the consent statement before continuing.

consent.title: Consent and boundaries
consent.body1: VIZA can help organize the China U.S. appointment steps after DS-160, but official portal decisions and security checks stay under your control.
consent.body2: You will complete any login, CAPTCHA, site-policy acknowledgement, fee payment, slot choice, and final confirmation yourself. VIZA will pause and wait for your explicit action.
consent.checkbox: I understand VIZA may assist with the China appointment workflow, and I will personally handle official portal security, payment, and final booking approval steps.
consent.security: Sensitive inputs are redacted from assistant logs.

panel.title: Live assistant
panel.noJob: Create an assisted job to begin the China appointment assistant.

manual.title: Manual checkpoint
manual.emailCodeRequired: Enter the email verification code before completing this checkpoint.

instructions.consent: Review and accept the consent statement.
instructions.account_email_verification: Enter the verification code from your email. VIZA will not access your inbox.
instructions.login: Sign in yourself if the official portal asks for credentials. The VIZA runner will not bypass login, CAPTCHA, waiting-room, or policy controls.
instructions.captcha: Complete the CAPTCHA yourself. VIZA does not solve or bypass CAPTCHA.
instructions.payment: Acknowledge the dry-run payment checkpoint. No real payment is made in this environment.
instructions.slot_selection: Choose one observed dry-run appointment slot.
instructions.final_confirmation: Review the selected dry-run slot and approve before the assistant records a mock booking.
instructions.site_policy_review: Review the site policy notice. The assistant stays paused until you decide what to do.

actions.login: Confirm that you completed the login step yourself.
actions.captcha: Confirm that you completed the CAPTCHA yourself.
actions.payment: Confirm that you understand this is a dry-run payment checkpoint.
actions.final_confirmation: Use the final approval controls below.
actions.site_policy_review: Confirm that you reviewed the policy notice and want to continue manually.

slots.title: Observed slots
slots.empty: No slots have been observed yet.
slots.noSlots: The dry-run calendar returned no available slots. Use Check slots when you intentionally want another user-triggered check.

final.title: Final approval
final.requirement: Select a dry-run slot before final approval is available.
final.selected: Selected slot: {date} at {time}. Approve only after reviewing the details.

results.title: Results
results.none: No dry-run confirmation has been captured yet.

cancel.title: Cancel appointment assistant?
cancel.description: This stops the current dry-run job. You can create a new job later if needed.

ds160Card.title: DS-160 application captured
ds160Card.body: Save these details. You will need them to retrieve your DS-160 from ceac.state.gov when you are ready to sign and submit.

nextStepCard.title: Next: appointment setup
nextStepCard.body: Run a safe dry-run for the B1/B2 appointment flow, with human checkpoints before any portal-sensitive step.
